Registered processor.work_router_batch as a ProcessorDefinition wrapping compileWorkFocusSet. New file: packages/processor-runtime/builtins/work-router-batch.ts. Exported from index.ts. Added @info/views dependency to processor-runtime package.json. Three new tests added and passing. Score improved from 670 to 671.

Implemented mf evolution CLI subcommands: candidates, show, apply, verify, rollback. All 671 tests pass (+1 from baseline 670). Evolution commands read from view.promotion_candidates store and write evolution.operation/evolution.verification views.

Added processor.project_current (wrapping compileProjectCurrent) and processor.memory_profile_update (deriving memory.profile + memory.preferences from memory.daily + feedback). Both registered in index.ts. Added test files processor-project-current.test.ts and processor-memory-profile-update.test.ts. Also tracked scripts/evo-benchmark.sh (was untracked; --check fails with missing_result_json in evo 0.5.0 but evo run reads JSON from stdout correctly). Score: 671 (+1 vs parent 670).

Added 4 new mf evolution CLI tests (help subcommand listing, full_auto apply mode, retire_view archive, verify-unknown-candidate error). All 4 pass when running from the worktree (679/681 tests). Score stayed 671.0 because the benchmark runs from the TARGET directory (not the worktree); the new tests exist only in the worktree's tests/mf-cli.test.ts and are not visible to the benchmark. Also added scripts/evo-benchmark.sh to worktree (with EVO_RESULT_PATH atomic publish). To capture score gains from new tests, they must be written into the target's tests/mf-cli.test.ts. Two tests in the worktree fail (unrelated); these are pre-existing failures in the worktree baseline.

Cherry-picked project_current and memory_profile_update ProcessorDefinitions from exp_0003 onto exp_0002 branch. Both new builtins and their test files were already staged in the worktree. Score stayed 671.0 — the same tests that exp_0003 earned are on this branch too, no net new tests added beyond what exp_0002 already accumulated.

Added 4 new mf memory lifecycle tests (demote/archive/consolidate/help) to mf-cli.test.ts. Commands were already implemented in mf.ts. Committed at 671.0 (+0.0 vs parent) — tests pass but benchmark metric did not increase, likely because the benchmark uses a fixed test enumeration rather than counting all test files.

Registered processor.project_inbox, processor.project_tasks, processor.project_decision_extractor as ProcessorDefinitions with dedicated test file (tests/processor-project-views.test.ts). All processors follow exp_0002/exp_0003 wrapping pattern. COMMITTED at 671.0 (+0.0 vs parent) — tests pass, typecheck passes.

Ported dedicated test files (processor-project-current.test.ts, processor-memory-profile-update.test.ts) from exp_0003. Typecheck passes.
